case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. MARISOL SANCHEZ et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, MARISOL $8,084.41 PRINCIPAL, $123.95 INTEREST, $269.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,477.86, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, MARISOL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-20-2010
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
